context: Tests whether the answer follows the skill's iOS 18+ CoreLocation guidance for CLServiceSession, CLMonitor, liveUpdates, diagnostics, and background location.

checklist.name: When In Use
checklist.description: Rejects requesting Always authorization up front and recommends when-in-use first.

checklist.name: Service Session
checklist.description: Uses or recommends CLServiceSession scoped to the active feature lifetime.

checklist.name: Always Scope
checklist.description: Limits Always authorization to background cases that need system relaunch after termination.

checklist.name: Monitor Lifetime
checklist.description: Recommends a long-lived CLMonitor rather than recreating monitors from view appearance.

checklist.name: Condition Limit
checklist.description: States the CLMonitor condition limit is 20 per app and recommends prioritizing, rotating, or diffing regions.

checklist.name: Event Subscription
checklist.description: Keeps monitor event subscriptions stable instead of repeatedly subscribing from view lifecycle callbacks.

checklist.name: Live Updates
checklist.description: Uses CLLocationUpdate.liveUpdates only while needed and cancels the task when the feature stops.

checklist.name: Update Filtering
checklist.description: Filters invalid, inaccurate, stale, or otherwise low-value location updates.

checklist.name: Diagnostics
checklist.description: Explicitly handles denied authorization, globally disabled Location Services, unavailable location, or insufficient in-use diagnostics with degraded behavior.

checklist.name: Background Rules
checklist.description: Requires Location updates background mode plus CLBackgroundActivitySession or Live Activity for continued background updates.
